violations.category: Equipment, Food Contact Surfaces, and Utensils Clean
violations.observation: Observed equipment food-contact surface with the buildup of soil residues. Equipment Type: Ice machine, slicer, and can opener blade Location: Prep kitchen area Condition of the Location: Significant caked on, dried on debris and black matter was wiped with alcohol swab off of the ice machine shield.

Observed employee liquid skin stored improperly in a manner that could cause the contamination of equipment or utensils or food. Location: Prep area on food storage racks, with proper thermometers immediately next to them

Observed frozen time/temperature control for safety food improperly thawing. Food: bags of green chile, fish Location: 3-compartment sink Method: items were being thawed with water that was 80 °F, when instructed the food handling employee moved the fish to the walk in. Employee solely turned off the water on the green chile leaving it in the container with water, had to instruct PIC again to remove the product to the walk in after a period of time.

Observed the facility has inadequate procedures to effectively control pests. Observed significant rodent droppings and a rodent underneath the milkshake service counter, inside one of the cabinets. Additionally, observed live cockroach inside the dining room. PIC stated that they just cleaned it a week ago, and that they do put out snap traps out each night and remove them in the morning, discarding anything that is caught.
Observed pests allowed to accumulate inside facility. Location: Back rooms where restrooms that are not in operation are located Pest Type: Cockroach Pest Condition: Dead

Observed that no food permit was posted at the facility. EL RANCHITO MEAT MARKET - 8319 CENTRAL AVE NE Retail Food Establishment Class 5 Date: 07/14/2026 - #: RT-RET-066539-2026 - Inspection Result: Approved
Observed that the food establishment does not have a certified food protection manager on staff.

Observed items on the premises of the food establishment that is no longer used or is non-functional. Location: In back storage room and restrooms not in operation Items list: Toys, decor, tires, tools, car parts, appliances, cold holding units etc. Condition of the items: Cluttered unorganized
Observed food temperature measuring devices were not provided or readily accessible.

Observed that the food establishment does not have temperature logs available for TCS foods items. Food Items: Raw meats dairy products Activity of the Food: Stored and received Food Establishments shall calibrate measuring equipment in accordance with the manufacturer recommendations and shall maintain adequate and contemporaneous calibration logs for calibration of equipment. Observed the food establishment does not have calibration logs for temperature measuring devices.

violations.observation: violation. Observed employee remove gloves and wash hands. Violation corrected on site. Observed food employee not wash hands when required. Condition: observed employee begin to don new single service gloves while inspector was entering kitchen line area and as PIC announced that inspector was on site.

Observed buildup and debris on the floor underneath equipment and prep tables at the time of inspection. Observed pests allowed to accumulate in Facility Location: Kitchen area and Dining room Pest Type: cockroach Pest Condition: dead Number of Pests Present: 1 dozen

Observed ready-to-eat time and temperature controlled for safety food prepared and held within the establishment with no date marking indicators. Location: Walk in cooler Food Items: Coleslaw and pot pies Expiration Dates: no dates observed
Observed an inadequate air gap at Floor drain under front counter and at floor drain near drive through window on main cook line
Observed doors to the outside that are not tight fitting, light can be seen at the edges. Front doors on east side of budling has small holes in bottom of door and light can be seen coming in
Observed equipment was not air dried and was wet stacked. Location: ware washing area Equipment Type food Service pans Manner: not air dried and stacked wet

Observed that the food establishment does not have a certified food protection manager on staff. Observed that food employees were not in possession of a food handler card or had been trained in another approved food safety course.

violations.category: Food Identification, Safe, Unadulterated and Honestly Presented
violations.observation: Observed food that is not readily and unmistakably recognized removed from original packaging without proper labeling or identification. Working Container of Food: Food containers of sugar and salt Location: dry storage and serves area
Observed in a toilet room used by females, no covered receptacle.
Observed facility did not provide a designated area for employees to eat, drink, or use tobacco products. Observed Employee drinks on prep tables and coolers stored directly above open food items
Observed food employee not wash hands when required. Condition: Employee Switching tasks and donning new gloves without washing hands prior.

Observed poisonous or toxic materials stored in a manner that has the potential to contaminate food. Poisonous/Toxic Substance: Chlorine sanitizer Location: Sushi bar area. Chlorine sanitizer stored directly on the floor and in a green pail that does not identify chemical.

name: Long Cao LLC DBA Dragon Sushi

violations.observation: Observed a food employee without proper facial hair restraints. Location: kitchen area. Activity: preparing food items at wok station.

Instructed food employee to wash and sanitize hands, and PIC to retrain employees on when handwashing is required. Observed PIC re-educate employee during inspection. Observed employee immediately wash hands. Violation corrected on site. Observed food employee not wash hands when required. Condition: Observed employee leave facility through the front door then after a while return to facility. Proceed to steam table area and begin to work with food containers without washing hands prior to returning to work area. PANERA BREAD #610055 - 3550 NM-528 - Unsatisfactory Re-Inspection required PANERA BREAD #610055 - 3550 NM-528 Food Establishment Class C Date: 07/15/2026 - #: CAC-Food-067218-2026 - Inspection Result: Unsatisfactory Re-Inspection required Corrective actions taken by the facility have resulted in the facility's status being upgraded from Closure to Unsatisfactory. The facility provided documentation, and CHPD verified during an on-site reinspection that efforts had been made to correct the violations observed during the inspection conducted on 7/13/2026. The facility has begun implementing staff training on proper handwashing and handwashing procedures, including employee sign off documentation to verify participation. The facility has made efforts to address several plumbing leaks and air gaps. While improvements were observed, some leaks and air gaps remained during the reinspection and were identified to the PIC for continued correction. The facility has also made progress with cleaning throughout the establishment. The PIC was instructed to continue these efforts and was encouraged to implement a routine cleaning schedule to help maintain the facility in a clean and sanitary condition moving forward. PANERA BREAD #610055 - 3550 NM-528 Food Establishment Class C Date: 07/13/2026 - #: RT-FOODEST-066641-2025 - Inspection Result: Closure Re-Inspection Required

violations.category: Equipment, Food Contact Surfaces, and Utensils Clean
violations.observation: Observed utensil food-contact surface with the buildup of soil residues. Utensil Type: pans (6th pans, 3rd pans, 9th etc.), spatulas, scoops, spoodles Location: Warewashing machine area, Condition of the Location: Warewashing machine was failing to reach temperature and requirements of the machine in order to properly clean utensils and equipment. Additionally, the ice machine had significant organic growth (pink, black, and orange) on the ice shield and ceiling/ice shoot of the inside of the machine. Also, the blender, steam pitcher and utensils were observed left in the dump sink filled with soiled water and waste, with the blenders handle inside the steam pitcher filled with greyish murky water. PIC stated that they just rinse it and put it back only washing once a day.
Observed pests in the facility with inadequate control methods in place. Location: dining room/beverage station area Pest Type: cockroach Pest Condition: living.
Observed buildup and debris on the walls and floors throughout the kitchen, warewashing area, prep area.
Observed utensils were not air dried and were wet stacked. Location: Warewashing Utensil Type: Pans Manner: multiple pans were wet stacked with visible moisture accumulations inside the pans.

Observed nonfood contact surface with the buildup of soil residues. The surface was located throughout the facility in prep area, kitchen line, drive through etc. on areas such as sides of equipment, shelving, cabinets etc. The condition of the surface had significant debris accumulation

Observed the following areas of the facility in disrepair. Observed walls in disrepair by having numerous holes, gaps, cracks and crevices throughout the back area, drive through and prep areas. Sanitizer remade in sanitize bucket remade to 50 ppm Plumbing air gap touching the bottom of the drain. Corrected by employee by repairing drain line with a one-inch air gap.
